programme.title: The Land of Spirits - EP 1 众神之地
programme.desc: Legend has it that when the first ray of sunlight touched Mount Kailash, the first yak was born. When early Tibetans struggled to survive on the plateau, the mountain god divided wild yaks into two groups: one descended to help humans, becoming domesticated yaks, while the others remained in the mountains as wild yaks. Over generations, domestic yaks grew weaker and less resistant to disease, and herders now seek to strengthen their genes.

programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - BRAND'S® Health-For-All Set
programme.desc: Healthy body, healthy life. Step it up with Brands! 生活过得好，身体健康最重要。阖家健康保健品，为你加油打气！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Healthy Electrical Pressure Cooker 4L with Crystalline Air Fryer 4L Bundle
programme.desc: 14-in-1 La Gourmet pressure cooker that cooks food quickly using steam pressure La Gourmet glass air fryer cooks food by circulating hot air to produce crispy and healthier meals. 14 合 1 La Gourmet 高压锅使用蒸汽压力快速烹饪食物，La Gourmet 玻璃空气炸锅通过循环热空气烹煮出酥脆又健康的美食。

programme.title: Star Guide - Sport Stars We Wish We Could Train With - EP12

Who's hot and who's not? Well - we've done your homework for you in this fresh, entertaining look at exactly who's got it going on in and out of the sporting arena... let us be your personal chauffeur through the sports celebrity universe...welcome to Star Guide!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Einstein: Language Nursery
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.desc: A superhero lesson on creative thinking leads Billy to question what it means to be a monster.

programme.desc: A mystery is afoot, toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - The Number Hunter: Part 1 - EP13
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep4 - EP4
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Einstein: Language Nursery
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - How to behave at the table? - EP101
programme.desc: In this first episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to accompany her on their first adventure together. The tour will take them to know and discover how they should behave at the table, learning that cutlery is a very important tool and that they have their own language.

programme.title: Mellodees - Monster Mash - EP14
programme.desc: Trick-or-Treat! Grab your costume and don't forget your dancing shoes for Dee's Halloween smash.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep19 - EP119
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team record a song to promote saving the environment.

programme.desc: The Rangers have to save the unique animals at a hydrothermal vent. / The Rangers rescue a giant catfish.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Monster Smash / A Monster of a Mystery - EP108
programme.desc: When JD and Kent's battle bot, Monster Smash, escapes from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must navigate a maze to find it. / When JD and Kent believe that the dreaded Whomper is lurking outside the lab, Kent is terrified. JD hopes to become famous for discovering an unknown creature. The team must use science to determine if it's really a monster or if they can correctly classify it as some other animal.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Get a Clue, Dude - EP119
programme.desc: The Secret Millionaires Club help a robotics museum called the Robosity Museum to attract more visitors. At the same time, items mysteriously disappear where Starty is behind this due to Radley constructing a self repair unit in him. After Starty comes in contact with the display of the robot Arty (who was built by the scientist Professor Otto von Otto), this causes a chain of events that activates all the robots in the museum who start helping Arty to repair Starty by claiming different items.

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Shakespeare: World of Poetry
programme.desc: Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature. By combining the poetry with engaging puppet shows, funny sound effects, colorful, stimulating images and the glorious music of Ludwig van Beethoven, this exciting introduction to language provides countless opportunities for you and your baby to interact as you explore the wonderous world together!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Urbanity - EP102
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will guide the children through an exciting journey through the world of "Urbanity" where the children will discover that with a good attitude and respecting all people equally, their life will be more fun, happy, and surrounded by friends!

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15
programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team fight Nick Slick and his building of a New Hotel to save a beach and a bunch of sea turtle eggs.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S1 - Prairie Dog Day Afternoon / We Didn't Start the Fire Ants - EP119
programme.desc: The Rangers save a keystone species. / The Rangers get rid of invasive fire ants.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Slime Time / It’s Always Sharkest - EP109
programme.desc: When JD uses Angie’s ‘oil slick dissolver’ formula for a slime fight, a wrong ingredient creates a gelatinous Blob monster that threatens to devour the city. / While visiting one of Kent’s relatives, the kids come up with a great idea for attracting more tourists to his restaurant - the only catch is that it also attracts a very big shark with very big teeth!

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Fashion Bot Fiasco - EP120
programme.desc: Lisa and Radley create a Fashion Bot which sparks interest from a national toy chain, but the kids focus their attention on a local store and a science fair.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - How The Super Ks Save Christmas, Part 1 - EP107
programme.desc: The Super K's must stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from cancelling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Yeti Tales
programme.desc: Join Us in Yeti Tales !

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Get ready to dance and sing-along to music-filled episodes

programme.title: LOL Block
programme.desc: A crazy collection of hilarious comedy series featuring shows like, Jelly Jam, Crazy Candies, Karim & Noor, and Talking Tom.

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Bino & Fino
programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Nutri Ventures
programme.desc: Protecting Healthy Foods At All Costs!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - At The North Pole
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Package
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - Sleepwalker
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Pizza
programme.desc: Bernard

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Unicycle
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Motorboat
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Prisoner
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Crack In the World
programme.desc: Dr. Steven Sorenson (Andrews) plans to tap the geothermal energy of the Earth's interior by means of a thermonuclear device detonated deep within the Earth. Despite dire warnings by fellow scientist Ted Rampian (Moore), Dr. Sorenson proceeds with the experiment after secretly learning that he is terminally ill. This experiment causes a crack to form and grow within the earth's crust, which threatens to split the earth in two if it is not stopped in time.

programme.title: Sartana's Here… Trade Your Pistol For A Coffin
programme.desc: Sartana is hired to prevent shipments of gold being continually stolen, but some unscrupulous villains are not happy with this arrangement. Stars George Hilton and Charles Southwood.

programme.title: Zulu
programme.desc: Outnumbered British soldiers do battle with Zulu warriors at Rorke's Drift.

programme.title: Professionals for a Massacre
programme.desc: Caught selling stolen guns, three Confederate soldiers get a reprieve from the firing squad, provided they go into Mexico on a mission to recover stolen gold belonging to the Confederacy.

programme.title: Wanted Dead Or Alive
programme.desc: This movie features a character who is supposed to be the descendant of the character played Steve McQueen in the television series of the same name. And like McQueen's Josh Randall, Hauer's Nick Randall is also a bounty hunter as well as an ex-CIA operative, who is asked by his former employer to help them track down a terrorist, Malak Al Rahim.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Professionals for a Massacre
programme.desc: Caught selling stolen guns, three Confederate soldiers get a reprieve from the firing squad, provided they go into Mexico on a mission to recover stolen gold belonging to the Confederacy.

programme.title: 101 Long Forgotten Hits! - EP1
programme.desc: Perhaps better known for bigger hits - all of these tracks from famous acts surely deserve another outing? You'll not have heard most of these songs for ages!

programme.title: Non-Stop No.1s Day! - EP1
programme.desc: Our choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!

programme.title: 3 Decades of Genuinely Fab No.1s! - EP1
programme.desc: An amazing UK number 1 from every year of the 70s, 80s & 90s! Starting with Smokey Robinson in 1970 & ending with Britney Spears in 1999.

programme.title: 3 Decades of Genuinely Fab No.1s! - EP1
programme.desc: An amazing UK number 1 from every year of the 70s, 80s & 90s! Starting with Smokey Robinson in 1970 & ending with Britney Spears in 1999.

programme.title: Turbo Trax! - EP1
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: The UK Top 20 of the 80s - EP1
programme.desc: Radio 1 legend Bruno Brookes returns with a countdown of the 20 biggest singles of the decade. Including million-selling hits from Frankie, Wham! & Soft Cell.

programme.title: The Bank Holiday Starts Here! - EP1
programme.desc: We've got that long weekend feeling, so here are some of the biggest party tunes of the 80s - back to back!

programme.title: Every Number 1 of the 80s! - EP1
programme.desc: In order - Mark Goodier's 11 hour journey through the decade's biggest number 1 songs, from Abba and Adam Ant, to Wham, Madonna, Rick Astley and Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: Mark Goodier's No.2s of 1986 - EP1
programme.desc: 60 minutes of back to back UK chart runners-up from 1986 - including hit ladies Madonna, Sinitta, Kim Wilde & Su Pollard! With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.

programme.title: Every Number 1 of the 80s! - EP1
programme.desc: In order - Mark Goodier's 11 hour journey through the decade's biggest number 1 songs, from Abba and Adam Ant, to Wham, Madonna, Rick Astley and Kylie Minogue.

programme.title: Turbo Trax! - EP1
programme.desc: A non-stop ticket to the ultimate retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.

programme.title: Chartbusters! with Bruno Brookes - EP1
programme.desc: They seemed to arrive from nowhere, burst into the chart & caused a mini pop sensation. Bruno's back, taking you through the decade year by year, with his pick of 30 surprise hits!

programme.title: Monday Night at the Movies! - EP1
programme.desc: Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW 80s' biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off those mobile phones!

programme.title: I've Had Enough! I'm Going Solo! - EP1

programme.title: Just Like A Woman
programme.desc: Two women travel from Chicago to Santa Fe to escape their suffocating lives. Marilyn dreams of winning a contest held by a famous belly dancing company, while her friend, Mona, has a darker secret.

programme.title: From The Vine
programme.desc: A burnt-out executive experiences an ethical crisis and travels back to his hometown in rural Italy to recalibrate his moral compass.

programme.title: Sleepless Night
programme.desc: A cop with a connection to the criminal underworld finds his secret life exposed when he and his partner are caught stealing cocaine from a powerful drug dealer, a move that puts his son's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Lilly's Disappearance (2)
programme.desc: Lilly has now been missing for days without a trace. A journalist convinces Anna and Robert that the media could help. Meanwhile, the police unexpectedly focus the investigation on Lilly’s own parents. And the evidence against them is mounting.

programme.title: Deal At The Border
programme.desc: Aza and Samat, two drug runners navigating the secret routes in the mountains of Central Asia, stumble upon Nazik, a young girl fleeing from slavery. When Nazik is recaptured by a criminal, facing a grim return to captivity, Aza resolves to save her.

programme.title: Light Years (2021)
programme.desc: Three siblings that have grown apart, find themselves forcibly reunited as they need to sell off their childhood home. They embark on a journey to their hometown in their father’s old car, and the road home forces them to confront their buried conflicts.

programme.title: Vera Dreams of the Sea
programme.desc: Vera, a devoted wife, mother, and grandmother, has her serene life turned upside down by her husband's sudden suicide. As greedy relatives and an underworld scheme threaten their family’s home, she must confront danger and take control of her own fate.

programme.title: Tuesday Club
programme.desc: Karin's world crumbles on her 40th anniversary when she discovers her husband’s infidelity. Seeking solace in a cooking class with renowned chef Henrik, she rediscovers her lifelong passions and learns that it is never too late to follow her dreams.

programme.title: Goodnight Mommy
programme.desc: In a secluded countryside home, ten-year-old twins grow suspicious when their mother returns from plastic surgery distant and unrecognizable. Isolated from the world, they embark on a quest to find out whether this woman is their mother.

programme.title: A Minute's Silence
programme.desc: In a small Baltic town, 18-year-old Christian and his teacher Stella fall for one another and begin a secret affair. However, the intensity of their feelings soon overwhelm them. When tragedy befalls Stella, Christian is forced to confront his first love.

programme.title: Just Like A Woman
programme.desc: Two women travel from Chicago to Santa Fe to escape their suffocating lives. Marilyn dreams of winning a contest held by a famous belly dancing company, while her friend, Mona, has a darker secret.

programme.desc: Ex-racer Bertie is facing financial issues with his car repair shop and go-kart track. He plans to participate in an upcoming 90’s race to solve his money problems, but he is suddenly asked by his ex-wife to take care of their son.

programme.title: Unsinkable
programme.desc: In 1981, the newly built and unsinkable rescue boat RF2 sinks on an early mission, killing nine. Henrik, son of the captain blamed for the disaster, must investigate amidst resistance from fishermen fearing job losses and authorities dreading scandal.

programme.title: Young Tiger
programme.desc: Illegally smuggled into France to work, 15-year-old Many is unexpectedly placed in school and a foster home. Years later, thriving in the French Sikh community, Many faces a moral dilemma arising from his ties to his family in his home country.

Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Pro 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier
programme.desc: When Hazelle walks into an empty office, she discovers a full-blown flu outbreak! Find out how Hazelle uses the 2-in-1 Humidifier and Purifier to fight back against stale air, germs, and dry office conditions. 当 Hazelle 走进空荡荡的办公室时，竟发现同事们全军覆没！ 快来看 Hazelle 如何用这台二合一加湿净化机，对抗干燥空气、细菌和闷热的办公室环境.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ErgoLuxe Ergonomic Chair v2
programme.desc: What starts as another chaotic workday turns into a full-blown chair investigation! From posture analysis to ergonomic upgrades, Zeliang's on a mission to save Hazelle (and her spine) from bad office habits. Discover how a few smart adjustments and one seriously comfy chair can make every hour at your desk feel a whole lot lighter! 今天的办公室，不只是打工日，而是一场"椅子侦查"！泽亮化身CSI专家，检查Hazelle从颈项到腰椎的"犯罪现场" 一场笑料背后，其实藏着打工人久坐的真实痛点。跟着他们一起学几招，让坐班族也能轻松舒适过每一天！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Panasonic EH-NA9M
programme.desc: Combat dryness and elevate your hair care with Panasonic EH-NA9M. Its nanoe™ and Mineral Ion technology infuse moisture deep into strands and scalp, promoting smoother, healthier hair. With Skin Care mode, it even hydrates your skin—your all-in-one beauty tool for effortless styling and daily nourishment. Panasonic EH-NA9M 吹风机采用独家 nanoe™ 奈米水离子与矿物负离子技术，有效滋润发丝与头皮，告别毛躁，打造柔顺亮泽秀发。Skin Care 模式还能为肌肤补水，一机多用，轻松在家享受沙龙级护理体验

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! Sleek and durable, its 10-layer titanium Protectal® non-stick coating keeps even heavily seasoned dishes from sticking or burning. Ergonomic handles offer a comfortable, secure grip, while no-drip rims prevent spills. The CookStar® base works on all stoves—including induction—for even, effortless cooking. Easy to clean, built to last, and stylish, it makes every meal a delight and is the perfect choice for a modern, premium kitchen. 升级厨房体验，选择德国制造的 Fissler Stardust Forte！时尚耐用，10层钛强化 Protectal® 不粘涂层，即使烹饪重口味菜肴也不粘、不焦。人体工学手柄握感舒适稳固，防滴漏锅边避免溢出，CookStar®锅底适用所有炉具（含电磁炉），加热均匀、省心省力。易清洁、耐用又有型，让每一餐都成为享受，是现代高端厨房的理想之选。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day. Karihome Gold 成人羊奶粉口感顺滑，富含易吸收的羊奶蛋白，采用先进脱膻技术，保留营养与纯净口感，连肠胃敏感者都能安心饮用。 还特别添加叶黄素、胶原蛋白和 Omega-3，支持眼睛、关节及心脑血管健康。每天两杯，补钙增强免疫力，适合全家饮用，特别适合年长人士，助力骨骼健康与活力。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Detox
programme.desc: Feel light, clean, and energized with Kinohimitsu Detox, specially curated for TWS by experts— a trio of Bio-Booster, Detox Enzyme, and Footox. Boost nutrient absorption, ease digestion, and flush out toxins naturally. Ease the constipation and cleansing your body, easy for you to create a daily routine for total wellness. Kinohimitsu 轻盈排毒组专家专为TWS精心打造的轻盈排毒组，让您感觉轻盈、洁净、充满活力——它包含Bio-Booster、Detox Enzyme 和Footox 3项好评排毒保健品。有助于促进营养吸收，促进消化，并自然排出毒素。缓解便秘，净化身体，让您轻松建立维护全面健康的日常习惯。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Epitex Pillow Bundle
programme.desc: Epitex Brace Contour Pillow is made from dermatological-grade elastomer polymers, molded into a unique grid-like structure that provides unparalleled support while reducing pressure on your head and neck by minimizing surface tension. Epitex Brace Contour Pillow由皮肤科级弹性硅胶制成，提供卓越支撑，有效吸收头颈压力。独特网格设计带来强支撑力和回弹性，同时减少对面部皮肤的挤压。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus
programme.desc: Health+ Nutripack Snow Fungus is a non-cook fungus, ready to eat in just one minute. It contains 100% pure natural organic white fungus with no preservatives or chemical additives added. Health+雪颜银耳 ，免煮即食只需1分钟即可享用。100% 纯天然有机银耳，不添加防腐剂或化学添加剂

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree
programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin. Health+ 红枣原汁 + 桑葚原浆采用纯果汁制作，不加糖、不加水、无防腐剂。每一小包都能随时随地为你补充天然营养。红枣有助提升气血、增强免疫力、改善睡眠、呵护女性健康；桑葚则富含抗氧化成分，有助护眼、促进皮肤亮泽，全面提升你的状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos Shuttle Chef Thermal Cooker
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later 节能无火焖烧锅，保持食物营养, 早上轻松准备，晚上即可享用热食

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Vileda EasyWring Spin Mop & Bucket Cleaning Bundle Set
programme.desc: The secret weapon for effortless cleaning. 说再见脏地板，迎接闪亮干净！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Revival Shampoo
programme.desc: A breakthrough 4-in-1 formula that colors, nourishes, volumizes, and strengthens hair—while improving scalp health in just 5 days. Powered by Korean patented polyphenol technology, it offers safe, natural grey coverage without harsh chemicals, leaving hair darker, fuller, and healthier with every wash. Ellixi发量黑洗发水，采用颠覆性的4合1配方：洗头同时染发、护发、增发量并强韧发丝，仅需5天即可改善头皮与发质。采用韩国专利多酚技术，无需染发剂或化学添加，温和自然遮盖白发。结合多酚氧化着色原理与草本养护成分，让秀发一洗更黑、更丰盈、更健康。

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaskan Horror
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two large lakes.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade braves the radiation in Chernobyl on the trail of a monster fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates tales of a mysterious shark-octopus hybrid called the Lusca.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.title: River Monsters - Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: A mysterious sea creature impales victims on the island of Sulawesi in Indonesia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Man-Eating Monster
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade embarks on a mission in Guyana in South America.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into Central America in search of a killer fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Pack of Teeth
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in southern Africa on the banks of the Okavango.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 2)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, continues the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Piranha
programme.desc: Are the stories of piranha attacks on humans just myth and imagination?

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: MP Series '25: Transvulcania '25 H/L
programme.desc: Volcanic climbs and epic views on La Palma: witness the drama, endurance, and beauty of one of the world's most iconic trail races.

programme.title: DFB Pokal Frauen '25/26: Borussia Dortmund v Borussia MG
programme.desc: The 2025-26 DFB-POKAL FRAUEN will be the 44th season of the annual German football cup competition.

programme.title: Jump Saudi '25: CSI5 World Cup Qualification
programme.desc: Jump Saudi 2025 is an international equestrian show jumping championship held in Saudi Arabia. It brings together some of the best riders and horses from around the world.

programme.title: MP Series '25: Cape to Cape '25 H/L
programme.desc: From the Indian to the Southern Ocean, runners battle across Western Australia's epic coastline in a race of pure endurance.

programme.title: Tour Down Under '26: Stage 3 Norwood to Campbelltown
programme.desc: An annual Cycling event in Australia that features the elite teams from around the world. Three days of action to see who gets their campaign off to the perfect start.

programme.title: Jump Saudi '25: CSI4 World Cup Qualification
programme.desc: Jump Saudi 2025 is an international equestrian show jumping championship held in Saudi Arabia. It brings together some of the best riders and horses from around the world.

programme.title: Damallsvenskan '25: BK Hacken v Brommapojkarna
programme.desc: The Premier Women's Football League in Sweden featuring 14 teams from around the country. Watch BK Hacken v Brommapojkarna.

programme.title: Netball Super League '25: Pulse v Mavericks
programme.desc: The Netball Super League features the 8 Top Netball franchises from across the United Kingdom. Watch London Pulse v London Mavericks.

programme.title: Serie A Women 25/26: Como v Milan
programme.desc: Serie A Women is the highest league of women's football in Italy. Watch Como v Milan.

programme.title: Malaga Marathon '25
programme.desc: The Málaga Marathon features a scenic, mostly flat course through the historic city centre and along the Mediterranean, ideal for personal bests in mild December weather.

programme.title: Serie A Women 25/26: Lazio v Milan
programme.desc: Serie A Women is the highest league of women's football in Italy. Watch Lazio v Milan.

programme.title: Spartan Race '25: Hvar (Croatia)
programme.desc: The Croatian island of Hvar was again a core focus for the obstacle course racing (OCR) world, as it hosted the Spartan World Championship weekend from October 9-12, 2025.

programme.title: USL '25/26: Sporting Jax v Spokane Zephyr
programme.desc: The USL is a professional Womens league in the USA featuring 8 teams from across the country. Watch Sporting Jax v Spokane Zephyr.

programme.title: Tennis Stars - Superstitions - EP26
programme.desc: With tournaments in all four corners of the world throughout the year, the world of tennis never sleeps. Between grand slams, red carpets and sponsorship campaigns, the players have their work cut out.

programme.title: The Challenge - Water Sports - EP25
programme.desc: In this episode on the water, we meet some lovers of the paddle, go navigating with the best and head to Indonesia for a multi-sports water competition.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Olympians - EP50
programme.desc: Who is the greatest Olympic athlete of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Lando Norris - EP25
programme.desc: Lando Norris, from McLaren, forms part of the new guard of Formula 1, and seeks to impose himself as the next Grand Prix megastar.

programme.title: Football's Greatest Stage - Just Fontaine - EP13
programme.desc: Nobody has scored more goals during a single World Cup than Just Fontaine.

programme.title: The Front Row - Ferrari: The Heart of F1 - EP13
programme.desc: Ferrari and Formula 1 are indissociable. Find out how this legendary team has fashioned sport and vice-versa.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons Of Winter - EP61
programme.desc: They are the icons of the winter games, notably female skier Mikaela Shiffrin, ice skater Tonya Harding, Britain's Eddie the Eagle and the miraculous United States ice hockey team.

programme.title: Foul Play - Skategate - EP3
programme.desc: The scandal of the figure skating judges at the Salt Lake City Winter Olympics.

programme.title: The Iconic - Olympics - Winter Games - EP14
programme.desc: China's Eillen Gu became the queen of the snows at the Winter Olympics of 2022, Jamaica's bobsleigh team inspired a film, the big names of downhill skiing take it easy, while Shaun White has appropriated the snowboard half-pipe.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Jonah Lomu/ Peter Snell/ World Cup 2018 - EP17
programme.desc: Jonah Lomu changed rugby during the 1995 World Cup. Another New Zealander, Peter Snell, put his country on the map 30 years earlier. And the 2018 World Cup final gave rise to an own goal which became a masterpiece.

programme.title: The Iconic - Rugby - World In Union - EP25
programme.desc: The most emblematic moments of rugby take us from Nelson Mandela to China via Jonny Wilkinson's right boot.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Mandela & Pienaar/Comaneci/Phelps - EP30
programme.desc: South Africa united during the 1995 rugby World Cup, Nadia Comaneci is perfect in Montreal in 1976 and Michael Phelps took eight gold medals in Beijing in 2008, a record… or was it?

programme.title: The Challenge - Mad Riders - EP26
programme.desc: In this episode, we go from a mountain bike endurance race to indoor BMX to finish with some freestyle motocross.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Farewells - EP52
programme.desc: What sporting farewell moment is the greatest of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - - EP26
programme.desc: F1 has a rich and unique history and is replete with great stories and personalities. This is a well-designed series which covers the best of F1. It is very rare to find timeless F1 programmes which present the best of this sport.

programme.title: Tennis Stars - Andy Murray - EP1
programme.desc: In this episode, more on Novak Djokovic, Victoria Azarenka shares the reasons for her success and we look at the women behind Andy Murray. Serena Williams sets New York Fashion Week on fire while Roger Federer comes to the aid of deprived children in Africa.

programme.title: The Challenge - Freeskiing - EP1
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore off the beaten path with freeriders, make a detour on the pistes in ski cross and find out why Alpine skiing is the ultimate extreme sport.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - 100m Dash - EP1
programme.desc: Who is the greatest sprinter of all time? Today, all eyes look to Usain Bolt. But if we go back in time, athletes like Calvin Smith, Ben Johnson and Carl Lewis have set the pace.

programme.title: The Inside Line - Kimi Raikkonen - EP1
programme.desc: In this week's episode, we portray one of the most popular drivers of Formula 1's starting grid: Alfa Romeo's Kimi Raikonnen.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons Of Winter - EP61
programme.desc: They are the icons of the winter games, notably female skier Mikaela Shiffrin, ice skater Tonya Harding, Britain's Eddie the Eagle and the miraculous United States ice hockey team.

programme.title: Star Guide - We Wish Were Super Heroes - EP2
programme.desc: In this episode of Star Guide, meet the champions who wish they were superheroes. Let's go!

programme.title: Tennis Stars - Kei Nishikori - EP2
programme.desc: In this episode of Tennis Stars, Eugenie Bouchard aims for the top, Andy Roddick is a true star of tennis and Kei Nishikori is the uncontested champion of Asia. Plus, meet the men of the prestigious Grand Slam club.

programme.title: The Challenge - Paragliding - EP2
programme.desc: In this episode, we gather speed in air racing, defy the laws of gravity in aerobatics, cross the Mediterranean in hot air balloons, and fulfil a childhood dream by flying in a hang glider.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Footballers - EP2
programme.desc: Who is the greatest footballer of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Renault - EP2
programme.desc: In this week's episode, we focus on the former Formula 1 champion, Renault, and the desire of the French brand to return to its times of glory.

programme.title: Invincible - Floyd Mayweather - EP7
programme.desc: Floyd Mayweather has won 50 victories in 50 fights in one of the most incredible careers in boxing.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Floyd Mayweather JR - EP31
programme.desc: Some fans of Floyd Mayweather love him so much that they have sworn a lifelong devotion. Some other UFC fighters have experienced many defeats but remain adored by millions of fans. And the sprinter Usain Bolt is compared to the great boxer Muhammad Ali.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Angela Lee - EP7
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the best champions of combat sports, including MMA fighters Angela Lee and Paige VanZant and their colleague Michael Bisping. Hollywood loves combat sports - here's the proof with Demi Lovato and Sylvester Stallone.

programme.title: Heroines - Serena Williams - EP10
programme.desc: Serena William as considered the greatest female tennis player of all time… and could well be the most influential sporting personality - male or female - since the beginning of the century.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons of Tennis - EP59
programme.desc: It's about tennis icons, notably Rod Laver, Steffi Graf, the rivalry between Martina Navratilova and Chris Evert, as well as the US Open.

programme.title: The Iconic - Tennis' Greatest Hit - EP41
programme.desc: Li Na, Ash Barty, Andy Murray and the Australian Open are all deserving of their status as tennis icons.

programme.title: Star Guide - Rugby Players We Wish We Were Friends With - EP3
programme.desc: In this episode of Star Guide, we present to you the rugby players we would like to be friends with - here we go!

programme.title: Tennis Stars - Caroline Wozniacki - EP3
programme.desc: In this episode of Tennis Stars, Dominic Thiem begins his career with style, Flavia Pennetta ends her career at the top and Caroline Wozniacki feels truly privileged to have the chance to participate in the WTA tour.

programme.title: The Challenge - Mountains - EP3
programme.desc: In this episode, we must first descend the slopes of the Himalayas by mountain bike and then head to Romania for a 4x4 race in the Carpathians called the SuperKarpata Trophy.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - Golf - EP3
programme.desc: Only two men have succeeded in dominating golf. Which one out of Jack or Tiger is the best of all time?

programme.title: The Inside Line - Redbull - EP3
programme.desc: We focus on the cutting-edge team of Grand Prix, Red Bull Racing.

programme.title: The Truth About - David Beckham - EP18
programme.desc: The career of David Beckham changed after a World Cup red card. Michael Phelps' journey to greatness began with a single step towards the podium in Athens. And Eric the Eel did not perhaps win a medal in Sydney.

programme.title: Top 20 - Hottest Boys On The Beach - EP64
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is an exclusive collation of the news and the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Short List - Top 10 Hardest Hitting Heavyweights - EP14
programme.desc: The top 10 of the most impactful heavyweight boxers.

programme.title: Star Rated - World's Sexiest Wags - EP113
programme.desc: TRACE Sport Stars runs a fine toothcomb over the greatest champions.

programme.title: Star Rated - Most Entertaining Cricketers - EP21
programme.desc: Your favourite sports stars observed away from the ground in 'Star Rated'!

programme.desc: Top is an unique classification of news on the champions who are causing a buzz in the world of sport!

programme.title: Star Guide - Sport Stars You'd Love To Show Off - EP4
programme.desc: In this episode of Star Guide, we present to you the champions with whom we would like to show off. It's started!

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Gronk Did It! - EP120
programme.desc: A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - The Number Hunter: Part 2 - EP14
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep5 - EP5
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Shakespeare: World of Poetry
programme.desc: Baby Shakespeare presents little ones with 12 common words that can be found within the rich context of classic poems and the beauty of nature. By combining the poetry with engaging puppet shows, funny sound effects, colorful, stimulating images and the glorious music of Ludwig van Beethoven, this exciting introduction to language provides countless opportunities for you and your baby to interact as you explore the wonderous world together!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Urbanity - EP102
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will guide the children through an exciting journey through the world of "Urbanity" where the children will discover that with a good attitude and respecting all people equally, their life will be more fun, happy, and surrounded by friends!

programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.desc: When JD uses Angie’s ‘oil slick dissolver’ formula for a slime fight, a wrong ingredient creates a gelatinous Blob monster that threatens to devour the city. / While visiting one of Kent’s relatives, the kids come up with a great idea for attracting more tourists to his restaurant - the only catch is that it also attracts a very big shark with very big teeth!

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Fashion Bot Fiasco - EP120
programme.desc: Lisa and Radley create a Fashion Bot which sparks interest from a national toy chain, but the kids focus their attention on a local store and a science fair.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - How The Super Ks Save Christmas, Part 2 - EP108
programme.desc: The Super K's must stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from cancelling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Eggs and I - EP121
programme.desc: Bates and Dawkins give Himari a BIG surprise.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - Training Days, Part 1 - EP15
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep6 - EP6
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaviors at School - EP103
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to a new expedition, this time they will leave for school. Together, they will discover how they should behave in this space that is so important for their development. The children will also learn about their favourite part of the day: recess!

programme.title: Mellodees - Hush Little Baby - EP16
programme.desc: Shhh it's nap time in Dee's room. Help Dee and Treble sing a lullaby to Teddy so he can get a good night's sleep.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep21 - EP121
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Plundered Paradise - EP102
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team help to save a shipment of endangered plants and animals.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S1 - Look Out Lemur / Don't Move A Mussel - EP120
programme.desc: The Rangers save a lemur, and teach Preston Praxton about terraced farming. The Rangers save a lake from invasive zebra mussels.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Zero Chemistry / Von Dropout - EP110
programme.desc: When the kids catch Von Bolts "crying," they build a robot girlfriend to keep him company, but the robot is too advanced and the kids have to play cupid if they're going to get them together. / Von Bolt, feeling underappreciated and overused, quits the team to find himself and a lot of trouble.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Sing Between the Lines - EP121
programme.desc: The Secret Millionaires Club search for a young singer named Lucinda who hides following a great audition at a performing arts school established by Kelly Rowland. programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - How The Super Ks Save Christmas, Part 2 - EP108

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.desc: In a small Baltic town, 18-year-old Christian and his teacher Stella fall for one another and begin a secret affair. However, the intensity of their feelings soon overwhelm them. When tragedy befalls Stella, Christian is forced to confront his first love.

programme.title: Manta Manta: Legacy
programme.desc: Ex-racer Bertie is facing financial issues with his car repair shop and go-kart track. He plans to participate in an upcoming 90’s race to solve his money problems, but he is suddenly asked by his ex-wife to take care of their son.

programme.title: Toubab
programme.desc: Soon after being released from prison, Babtou gets in trouble with the law again. Facing deportation to his foreign birthplace he’s never been to, he and his friend Dennis are willing to do anything to stay in the only home they've ever known: Frankfurt.

programme.title: Unsinkable
programme.desc: In 1981, the newly built and unsinkable rescue boat RF2 sinks on an early mission, killing nine. Henrik, son of the captain blamed for the disaster, must investigate amidst resistance from fishermen fearing job losses and authorities dreading scandal.

programme.title: Six Points About Emma
programme.desc: Blind and almost thirty, Emma is desperate to become a mother. She breaks up with her infertile boyfriend and sets out to find the perfect sperm donor without love or emotion, but soon discovers that it is not just her eyes which are blind.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Keep Going
programme.desc: Sybille is a divorced mother seeking to reconnect with her violent drifting son, Samuel. As a last resort, she takes him on a horse trip across Kyrgyzstan, facing its magnificent yet hostile natural environment, its people… and above all each other.

programme.title: Young Tiger
programme.desc: Illegally smuggled into France to work, 15-year-old Many is unexpectedly placed in school and a foster home. Years later, thriving in the French Sikh community, Many faces a moral dilemma arising from his ties to his family in his home country.

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: Black As The Snow 2: Dead At The Summit
programme.desc: An SUV races over the cliffs into the depths - the driver is killed instantly. The dead man was apparently involved in a robbery but there is no trace of the loot. French Officer Vivier and Swiss Captain Meyer once again team up to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Governance
programme.desc: Renzo, a brilliant and unscrupulous manager is forced to quit his position as general manager of an oil group after an investigation for corruption. Convinced that a young colleague betrayed him, he plots his revenge, but the situation gets out of hand.
